case_title: THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION VS. NNENA R UKUKU et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION SERVED JAN-04-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UKUKU, NNENA R
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT UKUKU, NNENA R DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2011

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-23-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
